groups.theme: Emotional support, anxiety relief, and mental health recovery
example_reviews: I wish that everyone who hasn't tried this app would!!!
helpful app where i can talk to for support
very kind supportive and enlightening thank you wysa xxx
it really helped me turn my negative thoughts into a positive mindset
This app has been really helpful towards my mental health recovery
groups.notes: Refined the automated emotional-support cluster by removing less relevant wellness-tool and pricing examples and keeping reviews focused on distress relief, emotional reassurance, and mental health recovery.

groups.theme: CBT exercises, mindfulness tools, guided meditation, and self-improvement features
example_reviews: Love Wysa. The steps are invaluable.
I love that this utilizes CBT techniques that help break negative thought cycles
good really liked mindful breathing relaxation tool helped helpful
informative, great tools and awesome skills to use
helpful talking also giving guided meditation breathing exercise
groups.notes: Kept the automated grouping structure but refined the theme to focus on concrete therapeutic tools such as CBT, breathing, meditation, and guided self-help exercises.

groups.theme: Chatbot intelligence, response relevance, personalization, and conversation memory
example_reviews: Tried for about half an hour. Would ask questions then disregard all my responses
it's a really good app but it would be better if it remembers every conversation.
Slow and unoptimized, responses can feel robotic and not relevant to what was said.
Please update this AI so that it can speak other languages besides English
gives completely irrelevant answer thought input
groups.notes: Refined the automated chatbot-quality group by emphasizing response relevance, memory, and personalization issues while removing reviews that were primarily about pricing or general emotional support.

groups.theme: Accessibility, multilingual support, and inclusive user experience needs
example_reviews: very easy to use and i like the way it responds to anything you ask
Please update this AI so that it can speak other languages besides English, such as Indonesian.
psyhelp al mindfulness support truly transformed way approach mental wellness app intuitive easy navigate
It will be a great help if we can chat in English as well as in Sinhala
This app has been very helpful in keeping me focused in the present moment
groups.notes: Revised the automated accessibility grouping to better reflect multilingual support, simple navigation, and inclusive usability needs, including accessibility-related expectations.

groups.theme: Subscription, premium features, and pricing concerns
example_reviews: do not install this app if you are searching for something free because this is paid.
charged eighty five canceled trial pleased quality app
started free trial got scammed gave info download
subscription based app download wish pay otherwise pointless
gotta love free app immediately asks payment
groups.notes: Refined the automated pricing group to focus specifically on subscription cost, paywalls, trial confusion, and value concerns while excluding reviews that were mainly about chatbot quality.
